description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with alternating vertical blue and white stripes around its sides, giving it a festive and eye-catching appearance. The top edge of the cake is bordered with a red zigzag icing trim, adding a decorative accent. The cake is topped with two clusters of white candles with yellow flames, each cluster arranged in a neat row. The cake sits on a flat, round, beige-colored base, likely a cake board or plate, which provides stability and ease of transport. The surface of the cake appears smooth, with the icing giving it a slightly glossy finish. The overall design is playful and celebratory, suitable for birthdays or festive urban gatherings.
description: A round, single-tier cake with blue and white vertical stripes, red zigzag icing trim, and two clusters of lit candles on top, displayed on a beige cake board.
description_view_0: Front view showing both clusters of candles and the full striped pattern with red zigzag trim.
description_view_1: Side view with one cluster of candles visible and the striped pattern wrapping around the cake.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing both clusters of candles and the striped design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with only one cluster of candles visible and the striped pattern continuing.
